Recommended reading 

Innovation - Business focus:

[Marr, B. (2020) The Intelligence Revolution: Transforming your Business with AI, Kogan Page (Chapter 9)](https://www.vlebooks.com/Product/Index/2059863) - Available on VLeBooks

Innovation – NLP focus:

[Rothman, D. (2024) Transformers for Natural Language Processing and Computer Vision, Packt, Third Edition (Chapter 9)](https://www.vlebooks.com/Product/Index/2182859) - Available via Kortext

From <[https://app.qa.com/resource/topic-8-ethics-and-nlp-futures-ai-1698/?context_id=15609&context_resource=lp](https://app.qa.com/resource/topic-8-ethics-and-nlp-futures-ai-1698/?context_id=15609&context_resource=lp)>

# [Rothman, D. (2024) Transformers for Natural Language Processing and Computer Vision, Packt, Third Edition (Chapter 9)](https://www.vlebooks.com/Product/Index/2182859) - Available via Kortext

## Shattering the black box with interpretable tools

Bertwiz shows visuals about what BERT is doing.

Local Interpretable Model-agnostic Explanations(LIME) visualise how LLM learns to understand language

Google's Language Interpretability Tool(LIT) uses Principal component analytis(PCA) or Uniform manifold approximation and projection (EMAO) to represent transformer model predictions.

# Main

## Ethics

Fake news and deepfakes.

Privacy and transparency. Facebook's Beacon programme breached customer privacy(advertising).

Black box problem - don't know why AI made the decision it did.

Trust and accountability.

Bias.

Security and hacking.

Key areas organisation should consider

- Building trust
- Avoiding the black box problem
- Thinking critically
- Avoiding bias

### Ethics and sustainability

1. Where is the product made
2. How is it made
3. What is it made from

### Government Data Ethics Framework

The Government Data Ethics Framework  has various principals]

- Transparency - 0 not public - 5 widely available
- Accountability - 0 not established - 5 public scrutiny build into project cycle
- Fairness - 0 risk of harm or discrimination - 5 project promotes just and equitable outcomes

[https://www.gov.uk/government/publications/data-ethics-framework/data-ethics-framework-2020](https://www.gov.uk/government/publications/data-ethics-framework/data-ethics-framework-2020)

### Asilomar AI Principles

[https://futureoflife.org/open-letter/ai-principles/](https://futureoflife.org/open-letter/ai-principles/)

### Professional Code of Conduct

[https://www.bcs.org/membership-and-registrations/become-a-member/bcs-code-of-conduct/](https://www.bcs.org/membership-and-registrations/become-a-member/bcs-code-of-conduct/)

### Human Rights Act 1998

[https://www.legislation.gov.uk/ukpga/1998/42/introduction](https://www.legislation.gov.uk/ukpga/1998/42/introduction)

### Journal

Racist hair dryers.

Racist bail amounts

## Copilots

When Industry 4.0 reaches maturity, It will be about machine to machine connections, AI will be primarily embedded in ready to use cloud AI solutions

Work with and using copilots to help generate the source code.

### Prompt engineering

Need a min input information(minI) to get maximum output(maxR).

d(T) = minI(input prompt) leads to maxR(response)

### Metonymy

When an attribute is used in place of the object. e.g. java for coffee.

e.g. java instead of cofee, can be confusing since java is also a programming language

### Ellipsis

It's the omission of speech or writing a word or words, that can be understood by context clues.

e.g. instead of saying want some coffee, just say want some.

If you add other data, like video then the LLM can do a better job at understanding what is happening.

## Github Copilot

Trained on public code and data on the internet

![](data:image/png;base64,)

[https://www.exxactcorp.com/blog/Deep-Learning/github-copilot-ai-pair-programmer](https://www.exxactcorp.com/blog/Deep-Learning/github-copilot-ai-pair-programmer)

## Domain-specific GPT-3 engines

Embedding2ML:

Instruct Series: Follows instructions better

Content filter: To filter bias or any form of unacceptable input and output, 0 safe, 1 sensitive, 2 unsafe

There are various embedding models with different dimensions

Instruct had fewer parameters but better outputs.

[https://www.forbes.com/sites/joemckendrick/2022/12/21/who-ultimately-owns-content-generated-by-chatgpt-and-other-ai-platforms/](https://www.forbes.com/sites/joemckendrick/2022/12/21/who-ultimately-owns-content-generated-by-chatgpt-and-other-ai-platforms/)

### Journal

NLP case matters

Industry 4.0 will see more use of cloud-powered, seamless AI

Prompt engineering will become an important skill

Copilots will help develop code

There are various models, embedding, instruct, and content filter models.

Further reading and bibliography

Recommended reading

[Marr, B. (2020) The Intelligence Revolution: Transforming your Business with AI, Kogan Page (Chapter 9)](https://www.vlebooks.com/Product/Index/2059863) - Available on VLeBooks

Rothman, D. (2024) Transformers for Natural Language Processing, Packt, Third Edition (Chapter 9) - Available via Kortext

It is strongly advised that you read the recommended module reading list to ensure you have covered the learning outcomes fully. However, it is not compulsory that you read everything.

Bibliography and references
